subject: About missing class
body: hi professor, i might miss tomorrow's class because i'm feeling off and a bit homesick. is it okay if i catch up later? sorry for the late note.

subject: kitchen time saturday?
body: hey could we figure out kitchen time this saturday? i want to make pelmeni from my hometown and it might smell a bit. maybe around noon? ok?
